text:
Once there was a kid named Timmy who lived in an old house with his cat, Mittens. Once every week, they'd go to the lake across town. One evening though...

Timmy's mom told him, "Don't play near the lake tonight." It was spooky.

"You're scared?" Timmy said. "Come sit by me."

"Nope," Mom said. "Just don't step off the porch."

"Why not?" Timmy asked eagerly. He jumped into Mittens' pouch.

Mom shook her head. "Just... watch a little."

Timmy wobbled around the porch, staring into the shadowed bushes.

Mom smiled. "See?"

The moonlight shimmered off an old tree.

Timmy jumped!

There was a rustling.

He screamed.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
